lede: A look at March 9 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Sunisa Lee and Brittany Snow, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 2023 Hamburg shooting
events.desc: A shooting in the Alsterdorf quarter of Hamburg, Germany, kills eight people and injures another eight.

events.title: 1977 Washington, D.C., attack and hostage taking
events.desc: The Hanafi Siege: In a 39-hour standoff, armed Hanafi Muslims seize three Washington, D.C., buildings.

events.title: Barbie
events.desc: The Barbie doll makes its debut at the American International Toy Fair in New York.

events.title: 1957 Andreanof Islands earthquake
events.desc: The 8.6 Mw Andreanof Islands earthquake shakes the Aleutian Islands, causing over $5 million in damage from ground movement and a destructive tsunami.

events.title: Allies of World War II
events.desc: World War II: Allied forces carry out firebombing over Tokyo, destroying most of the capital and killing over 100,000 civilians.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: Dutch East Indies unconditionally surrenders to the Japanese forces in Kalijati, Subang, West Java, and the Japanese complete their Dutch East Indies campaign.

events.title: American Civil War
events.desc: American Civil War: USS Monitor and CSS Virginia (rebuilt from the engines and lower hull of the USS Merrimack) fight to a draw in the Battle of Hampton Roads, the first battle between two ironclad warships.

events.title: Mexican–American War
events.desc: Mexican–American War: The first large-scale amphibious assault in U.S. history is launched in the Siege of Veracruz.

events.title: Manuel Belgrano
events.desc: Paraguayan forces defeat Manuel Belgrano at the Battle of Tacuarí.

events.title: Adam Smith
events.desc: Scottish philosopher Adam Smith publishes The Wealth of Nations, ushering in the classical period of political economy.

births.name: Ivan Henjak
births.line: Croatian-Australian rugby league player and coach

births.name: Helen Zille
births.line: South African journalist, politician and Premier of the Western Cape

births.name: Vyacheslav Molotov
births.line: Russian politician and diplomat, Soviet Minister of Foreign Affairs (died 1986)

deaths.text: Willie Davis (baseball), American baseball player and manager
Anna Laetitia Barbauld, English poet, author, and critic

observances.text: Christian feast day: Forty Martyrs of Sebaste
Christian feast day: Pope Cyril VI of Alexandria (Coptic Orthodox Church)
Christian feast day: Gregory of Nyssa (Episcopal Church (United States))
